name: World War II: When Lions Roared
original_name: World War II: When Lions Roared
overview: A 1994 war television miniseries which portrays Roosevelt, Churchill, and Stalin as they maneuver their countries through several of the major events of World War II - such events include the Blitz, Operation Barbarossa, the bombing of Pearl Harbor, the North African Campaign, the Allied invasion of Italy, and concluding with the Tehran Conference.

trailers.title: THEN THERE WERE GIANTS (1994) | Official Trailer
